transcript: People are always asking me, do you ever get tired of cooking? Well, not really, because food is my love language. It's pretty simple. If I want to show you how much I love and appreciate you, I make you food. Funny story, my husband told me that one of the moments that he fell in love was when we came back from a long road trip in the middle of the night. He had been driving for hours, and I wanted to show him how thankful I was, so I made him my quick 10-minute spicy noodle. And to this day, he said it was the best meal he's ever had. I cook every day, and Dom shows me his appreciation by doing the dishes. Since I cook so much,

timestamps.text: People are always asking me, do you ever get tired of cooking?
Well, not really, because food is my love language.
If I want to show you how much I love and appreciate you, I make you food.
Funny story, my husband told me that one of the moments that he fell in love
was when we came back from a long road trip in the middle of the night.
He had been driving for hours, and I wanted to show him how thankful I was,
so I made him my quick 10-minute spicy noodle.
And to this day, he said it was the best meal he's ever had.
I cook every day, and Dom shows me his appreciation by doing the dishes.
